initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN pizza_names.pizza_name = 'Meat Lovers' THEN 12 ELSE 10 END) + 
  SUM(COALESCE(pizza_get_extras.extras_count, 0)) AS total_income
FROM pizza_customer_orders
JOIN pizza_clean_runner_orders ON pizza_customer_orders.order_id = pizza_clean_runner_orders.order_id
JOIN pizza_names ON pizza_customer_orders.pizza_id = pizza_names.pizza_id
LEFT JOIN pizza_get_extras ON pizza_customer_orders.order_id = pizza_get_extras.order_id
WHERE pizza_names.pizza_name IN ('Meat Lovers', 'Vegetarian')
  AND pizza_clean_runner_orders.cancellation IS NULL;

SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN pizza_names.pizza_name = 'Meat Lovers' THEN 12 ELSE 10 END) AS pizza_revenue,
  SUM(COALESCE(pizza_get_extras.extras_count, 0)) AS total_extras,
  SUM(CASE WHEN pizza_names.pizza_name = 'Meat Lovers' THEN 12 ELSE 10 END) + SUM(COALESCE(pizza_get_extras.extras_count, 0)) AS total_income
FROM pizza_customer_orders
JOIN pizza_clean_runner_orders ON pizza_customer_orders.order_id = pizza_clean_runner_orders.order_id
JOIN pizza_names ON pizza_customer_orders.pizza_id = pizza_names.pizza_id
LEFT JOIN pizza_get_extras ON pizza_customer_orders.order_id = pizza_get_extras.order_id
WHERE pizza_names.pizza_name IN ('Meat Lovers', 'Vegetarian')
  AND (pizza_clean_runner_orders.cancellation IS NULL OR pizza_clean_runner_orders.cancellation = 'None');

  SUM(CASE WHEN pizza_names.pizza_name = 'Meat Lovers' THEN 12 ELSE 10 END) AS pizza_revenue,
